one_sentence: Retrieve wide for recall with a cheap bi-encoder, then rerank narrow for precision with an expensive cross-encoder that reads query and document together; keep top-N=20-50, rerank to top-k=3-5, and never use a reranker to fix a recall problem.

operation_candidates.name: ConfirmPrecisionNotRecall
operation_candidates.trigger: Considering a reranker; have not proven the symptom is precision rather than recall.
action: Run the existing pipeline against 30-50 labeled QA pairs.
Record hit-rate@N (is the gold doc in top-N) and MRR (how high).
High hit-rate + low MRR => precision problem => reranker is the right lever.
Low hit-rate => recall problem => STOP, fix retrieval/hybrid/chunking first.
operation_candidates.output: Go/no-go decision backed by a measured number, not a hunch.
evidence: llamaindex: OP-03 (#1/#10 = right doc in top-k, wrong top-1)

operation_candidates.name: WidenThenNarrow
operation_candidates.trigger: Reranker confirmed; pipeline still on naive top_k=4.
action: Retrieve top-N = 20-50 (recall stage).
Insert reranker, re-score every candidate against the query.
Keep top-k = 3-5 (precision tail to the synthesizer).
Embed N and k as named, evaluated constants.
operation_candidates.output: A two-stage retrieve->rerank pipeline with a high-precision tail.
evidence: llamaindex: Stage 3 step 7 (widen top_k to 20-50, rerank to 3-5)

operation_candidates.name: ChooseRerankerModel
operation_candidates.trigger: Reranker stage exists; model not yet chosen.
action: Cohere Rerank / Voyage rerank (API): fastest to ship, no GPU, multilingual; per-search cost, data leaves boundary.
bge-reranker (bge-reranker-v2-m3 / large) local: open-weights, self-hosted, no per-call fee, multilingual; needs GPU, you own ops.
SentenceTransformer cross-encoder (ms-marco-MiniLM): light, CPU-viable for small N, lowest-dependency local option.
ColBERT / late-interaction: token-level, precomputable, scales to larger N than a full cross-encoder.
Justify by latency budget, cost ceiling, data-residency, language mix.
operation_candidates.output: A model justified by constraints, not defaults.
evidence: external: cohere rerank, bge-reranker, cross-encoder rerank RAG

operation_candidates.name: BudgetLatencyAndCost
operation_candidates.trigger: Before shipping; reranker adds a per-query inference/billing unit.
action: Measure p95 added by the rerank call at the chosen N.
API: network round-trip + per-search cost. Local: GPU/CPU inference time.
Note latency scales with N, not k; over-large N is the latency killer.
Attach p95 and $/query deltas to the change; ship only if precision lift clears the bar.
operation_candidates.output: Latency/cost deltas attached to the change for a ship decision.
evidence: llamaindex: Stage 3 (high-impact but expensive; exhaust cheap knobs first)

operation_candidates.name: TuneNvsK
operation_candidates.trigger: Reranker live; N/k at defaults; want the precision/latency frontier.
action: Sweep N in {20, 30, 50} holding k fixed (candidate-pool recall ceiling).
Sweep k in {3, 5, 8} holding N fixed (LLM context size).
Pick smallest N that saturates hit-rate and smallest k that saturates faithfulness.
Pin the tuned (N, k).
operation_candidates.output: Tuned (N, k) on the cost/quality frontier, not guessed.

operation_candidates.name: RerankAfterHybrid
operation_candidates.trigger: Traffic has lexical-identity queries (codes, SKUs, symbols) AND a precision plateau.
action: Use hybrid retrieval (BM25 + dense) for the wide stage.
Rerank the fused candidate list with a cross-encoder.
Hybrid maximizes recall into the pool; rerank maximizes precision out of it.
operation_candidates.output: Best-of-both: lexical recall plus cross-encoder precision.
evidence: llamaindex: OP-04 AddHybridBM25 + OP-03 AddReranker (sequential in Stage 3)

operation_candidates.name: GateOnEval
action: Compare before/after on {MRR, faithfulness, relevancy, p95, $/query}.
Keep the reranker only on net-positive.
Treat it as a regression test for future retriever changes.
operation_candidates.output: Quantitative justification; the reranker is eval-gated.
evidence: llamaindex: Stage 2 (eval loop before optimizing) and Stage 4

dilemmas.name: Rerank latency vs answer quality
dilemmas.tension: Reranker reliably lifts precision but adds per-query latency (API round-trip or GPU inference); may violate an SLA even when quality improves.
dilemmas.resolution: SLA-driven: measure headroom, start N=20, shrink N or switch to a lighter model (MiniLM/ColBERT) if over budget; if still over and quality is acceptable, do not rerank.

dilemmas.name: API reranker vs local model
dilemmas.tension: Hosted API (Cohere/Voyage) ships fast, no GPU, SOTA, but bills per search and sends data out. Local bge/cross-encoder: no per-call fee, in-boundary, but needs GPU + ops.
dilemmas.resolution: Default to API to validate the lift cheaply, then migrate to local once volume/cost/residency justify it; wrap behind a rerank(query, nodes) seam so the swap is one line.

anti_patterns.name: Rerank to fix recall (gold doc not in top-N)
anti_patterns.fix: Fix retrieval/hybrid/chunking; a reranker only reorders what is retrieved

anti_patterns.name: Naive top_k=N fed whole to LLM, no rerank
anti_patterns.fix: Widen N and rerank to top-3-5 (llamaindex A6)

anti_patterns.name: Over-large N (rerank 200+ candidates)
anti_patterns.fix: Latency scales with N; pick smallest N that saturates hit-rate

anti_patterns.name: Add reranker before prompt/embed/chunk/hybrid
anti_patterns.fix: Order law: reranking is last; cheapest knobs first

anti_patterns.name: Hard-wire one vendor SDK throughout
anti_patterns.fix: Hide behind a rerank(query, nodes) seam for one-line API<->local swap

anti_patterns.name: Keep N=k (return all reranked candidates)
anti_patterns.fix: Reranking only helps when k < N; discard the low-scored tail

anti_patterns.name: Re-embed/re-chunk to fix a wrong top-1 that is present but buried
anti_patterns.fix: Present-but-buried is a rerank job, not a re-ingest

boundaries.action: Fix retrieval first; reranking is a no-op

boundaries.rule: Hard real-time / sub-100ms and quality acceptable

boundaries.action: No retrieval stage to rerank (llamaindex B1)

cross_framework.llamaindex: Node postprocessors: CohereRerank, SentenceTransformerRerank, ColbertRerank, LLMRerank; widen similarity_top_k, set reranker top_n
cross_framework.langchain: ContextualCompressionRetriever wrapping a base retriever with CohereRerank / CrossEncoderReranker compressor
cross_framework.colbert: Late-interaction reranker (RAGatouille); token-level, precomputable, scales to larger N
